TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Alexander_Lukashenko, title = Alexander_Lukashenko, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alexander_Lukashenko} }

S.FORM: Alexander Lukashenko I 1954 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Alexander Lukashenko, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Belarus anini i ci Alexander Lukashenko, patirengan a romi'ad i 1994 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 20 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: a…ĺ…ôxan…¨~…ģ…ôr …ĺo~u~ukasńß…ônko~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i a…ĺ…ôxan…¨~…ģ…ôr …ĺo~u~ukasńß…ônko~u, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~v…ô…ĺaro~u~us anini i ¶i a…ĺ…ôxan…¨~…ģ…ôr …ĺo~u~ukasńß…ônko~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Alexander Lukashenko I 1954 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Alexander Lukashenko, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Belarus anini i ci Alexander Lukashenko, patirengan a romi'ad i 1994 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 20 a romi'ad.
